suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit expectation to revisit 'next ACDC (two weeks)'. Already implemented and tested since devnet-1. Overdue for stage decision.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 stability assessment and devnet-7 scoping
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 launched just before ACDC #181 with Gloas fork activation. Need status update to confirm stability before devnet-7 launch (targeted mid-July). Devnet-7 scope includes consensus-specs #5399 patch and EIP-7688/8282 changes.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7688 (progressive containers) stage decision for Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Deferred DFI decision from ACDC #181 contingent on devnet-6 stability. Three clients ready (Nimbus, Lodestar, Lighthouse), three uncertain. Targeting devnet-7; needs resolution before mid-July launch window.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8282 (builder deposit contract) constants finalization and audit scheduling
suggestions.rationale: Contract update (target=8, max=64) targeting devnet-7. External audit planned for ~end of July post-devnet-7. Action item from #181 to open PR against sys-asm repo likely resolved async; need confirmation contract is final for audit.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) review and Hegota inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Proposed for Hegota in ACDC #179; client review requested. No follow-up in #180 or #181 suggests review incomplete. Lido validator impact data still pending.

suggestions.topic: PTC attestation cross-branch liveness risk and circuit breaker implementation status
suggestions.rationale: Potuz flagged serious liveness risk in ACDC #180 (clients only attest canonical head for PTC). ACDC #181 confirmed circuit breakers should track missing payloads not beacon blocks. Need status update on client implementations.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá headliner proposal window closure and CFI decisions
suggestions.rationale: Proposal window opened ACDC #177; end date TBD based on Glamsterdam progress. With devnet-6 launched and devnet-7 targeting mid-July, time to close window and begin CFI selections for Hegotá.

suggestions.topic: MPLEX deprecation timeline and client readiness
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #180 decided to keep MPLEX as fallback with removal ~Gloas+2 months. Lighthouse ready to drop; Teku and Nimbus need more time. Check-in on progress for coordinated removal.
